prediction.reasoning: Based on AON's historical volatility as a large-cap financial services stock (typically 15-25% annualized), I estimate a 7-day standard deviation of approximately 2.3% ($7.50). The point estimate assumes slight upward momentum typical of established insurance brokers. The confidence intervals reflect increasing uncertainty ranges: 50% CI covers ±2.4%, 80% CI covers ±4.3%, and 90% CI covers ±5.1% around the current price, accounting for normal market fluctuations and company-specific risks.
